text_jp: これは…未来からの通信！？{END}
text_en: Is this a transmission from the future!?{END}

text_jp: こちら２００４年、誰か聞こえますか？{END}
text_en: This is 2004. Can anyone hear me?{END}

text_jp:
こちらは１９７２年、
聞こえるぞ！{END}
text_en:
This is 1972.
I can hear you!{END}

text_jp:
４章１号編完
続いて５章前半です{END}
text_en:
Chapter 4, Rider 1 part complete.
Next is the first half of Chapter 5.{END}
